title: Bulk carrier ship spotted near Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A ship spotted on the...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A ship spotted on the waters near the Port of Mossel Bay this morning, 12 July is believed to be a bulk carrier.


> According to information gleaned from the Marine Traffic app, the ship, named Lady Litel, is currently on its way to Richards Bay in KwaZulu-Natal.


The app says the ship is from the Bahamas and is 180.82 metres in length and 30 metres in breadth.

Mossel Bay Advertiser sent a query to Transnet National Ports Authority regarding what the ship is carrying and where the ship travelled from.

Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
